Claim_Text: An executable byte-faithful protocol with signed local-PSD self/cross diagnostics is the organizing framework for heterogeneous Q/S/L/scale repair under a declared research codec.
Evidence_Type: method design; verified measurement protocol; planned allocator extension
Notes: The legacy round-trip audit protocol is implemented and has committed artifacts; the budget-band allocator extension and 15-job evidence remain planned. QSL composition, interaction theory, Hessian-aware rate allocation, and orthogonal Q/L coordination all have prior art; performance advantage is not established.

Claim_Text: Exact physical serialization can reverse a conclusion obtained from logical value-stream accounting.
Notes: Bounded to Pythia-70M, six selected MLP linear tensors, one seed.

Claim_Text: The tested legacy strict scaled Q+S+L file is tail-padded to the same 3248832-byte final length as Q+L, but its natural artifact is 15680 bytes smaller and its PPL delta is 0.557993 worse.
Notes: Rejects the conservative per-layer-guarded candidate only; it is not evidence about a budget-exhausted or globally optimal QSL frontier.

Claim_Text: S and L are nearly Hessian-orthogonal while Q-S and Q-L exhibit sizable negative cross terms.
Notes: Aggregate strict scaled QSL rho_H(S,L)=0.030354; rho_H(Q,S) about -0.4234 and rho_H(Q,L) about -0.5719.

Claim_Text: The Hessian proxy correlates strongly with each sampled radial NLL path but does not establish cross-candidate ranking or replace endpoint evaluation.
Notes: Six 13-point paths have within-direction proxy/NLL correlations about 0.9970-0.9995 and nonzero negative fitted linear terms; candidate-level rank correlation remains unmeasured.

Claim_Text: Small repair state can improve parameter utilization when evaluated by held-out loss recovered per exact byte.
Notes: OBS improves Q+S at zero additional artifact bytes in the bounded run and all three separate smoke scopes; block scale improves Q while adding bytes in all three smoke scopes. Folded global scale helps two scopes and hurts one, so small state is not sufficient by itself.

Claim_Text: A sufficient local same-byte condition for combination advantage requires the realized repair gain to exceed payload give-up and interaction cost, with feasible discrete allocation after all physical overhead.
Notes: The derivation includes nonzero first-order terms, Hessian interactions, discrete serialization, and endpoint validation. It is sufficient rather than necessary; its multi-seed/multi-rate empirical tests remain planned and it does not establish global optimality.

Claim_Text: An eight-seed leak-controlled WikiText-2 split is fixed for confirmatory evaluation.
Notes: Data/split manifest only; no eight-seed model result has been run.

Claim_Text: The framework generalizes across larger models, model families, full tensor scopes, and multiple rates.
Notes: Server 210 is reachable, but the 15-job directory has only 2 completed_valid CPU Pythia/OPT controls and 13 planned rows; separate live directories contain 1/24 Pythia confirmatory-frontier completion and 2/28 Qwen2.5-3B layer-0 gate-only SVD sentinels. All are untracked live state. The 3B/7B smoke covers only six gate/up tensors at three depths and excludes down_proj; existing observations do not verify generalization, a model-size trend, full-MLP/full-model compression, or an accuracy-rate frontier.

Claim_Text: External methods require separate A0/A1/B/C/D training-and-scope tracks and payload-matched comparison rules.
Notes: The 59-row registry and 27-row paper subset are literature protocol taxonomies, not measured leaderboards. Ten D-lane rows cover multimodal/video quantization, cache, sparse or structured attention, and sparse-low-rank attention. Harma, OBR, Hessian ECSQ, Optimal Formats, ProjQ, QuantSparse, and CacheQuant materially narrow novelty and stacking claims.

Claim_Text: LiftQuant block correction and optional end-to-end correction have different training objectives and reproduction status.
Notes: A patched layer-0 smoke produced an artifact but no full-model PPL, task score, or deployable byte result.

Claim_Text: The bounded strict artifacts and the three scalability-smoke jobs have independently checked file size, hash, decode, and controlled-process completion evidence.
Notes: The original bounded run records the base commit and dirty-file list but not the exact dirty diff. The three smoke jobs additionally record pinned checkpoint identities, suite/job/config hashes, a numerical-source aggregate SHA256, every selected-weight artifact hash and size, and fail-closed completion validation.

Claim_Text: The exact-rate allocator yields a better accuracy-rate frontier than every single repair and matched baseline.
Notes: This is the decisive performance claim and must remain unstated as fact until multi-model, multi-seed evidence exists.

Claim_Text: Three separate seed-17, selected-weight-target-0.258 scalability-smoke jobs repeat near-orthogonal S/L Hessian geometry and a positive strict-scaled-QSL-minus-QL endpoint NLL sign after conservative candidates are tail-padded to identical final selected-weight artifact bytes.
Notes: The strict natural files leave 31,360/640/1,024 bytes unused for Pythia/OPT/Qwen, so these are not budget-exhausted frontiers. Unpooled observations only: seed 17, one target 0.258, 1,016 held-out tokens, eight fixed windows, and six 13-point paths per job; no multi-seed, whole-model, cross-model-ranking, C8, or C12 claim.

Claim_Text: A multimodal extension should gate sink/global-low-rank, local/cyclic, dynamic-sparse, and dense attention paths and jointly account for weight Q/S/L/OBS, W/A PTQ, cache, temporal reuse, storage, runtime state, peak memory, and end-to-end latency.
Evidence_Type: cross-repository diagnostic synthesis; literature-grounded proposed method
Notes: Read-only visual-model diagnostics and external papers support the hypothesis and interaction terms, not a measured result. QuantSparse numbers are literature-reported and its official repository has not released code as of 2026-07-16. No standalone speedups may be multiplied.
